---
title: "Time"
description: ""
author: "Xinyuan Yan"
date: "2025-12-15"
categories: [reflection, life]
image: autumn_2023_W.jpg
---

![](autumn_2023_W.jpg){fig-alt="Autumn at straight lake state park"}

> Summer and winter and springtime and harvest,\
> Sun, moon, and stars in their courses above\
> Join with all nature in manifold witness\
> To thy great faithfulness, mercy, and love.

::: {style="text-align: right; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #888; margin-top: 1.5em;"}
Photo by Xinyuan Yan, Mirror Lake State Park
:::
